title: JoWY's Cleaner Blocks
description: A texture pack to make dirt blocks more polished, lower grass and nylium, new farmland sides, modified Minecraft Dungeons terracota and better red nether bricks at this moment
body:
A simple Resource Pack that changes dirt related blocks to make them look more polished and modern, lower grass and nylium related blocks to cover almost the entire side and new farmland sides, also new terracota with the style of Minecraft Dungeons but modified, and better red nether bricks.

- Dirt, rooted dirt and coarse dirt are no longer just a random noise texture, now they look like the packed mud texture but with the original colors, so it still looks vanilla but more coherent to newer textures.

- Grass, snowy grass, mycelium, dirt path, podzol, crimson and warped nylium blocks also have their sides increased to reach almost to the bottom.

- Farmland and moist farmland now have side textures, for front and back, and for left and right.

- Grass and podzol sides textures have been optimized, from having almost every pixel of a different color to only 7 colors.

- Terracota now looks like Minecraft Dungeons but without pebbles and with the colors changed to look better, so they look nice naturally and when used artificially.

- Red nether bricks now look like mud bricks, because I never used this block before, and now is perfect for building roofs.
